title: 2.5.68-mjb2 stops at activating swap
description:
Distribution: RH 7.3
Hardware Environment: 8-way pIII-700
Software Environment:
Problem Description:
On boot, the boot stops progressing at "Activating swap"  The machine is not
completely hung (magic sysrq works) but is useless of course.  I tried this with
2.5.68-vanilla and it does not have the same problem, but mjb1 and mjb2 do have
the problem.

Steps to reproduce:
Here's what I suspect it is having problems with:
(exerpt from /etc/fstab)
/dev/sda5               swap                    swap    defaults        0 0
/dev/sda6               swap                    swap    defaults        0 0
/dev/sda7               swap                    swap    defaults        0 0
/dev/sda8               swap                    swap    defaults        0 0
/dev/sda9               swap                    swap    defaults        0 0
/dev/sda10              swap                    swap    defaults        0 0
/dev/sda11              swap                    swap    defaults        0 0
/dev/sda12              swap                    swap    defaults        0 0
